name: HDInsight to Fabric Migration
description: Port HDInsight Spark/Hive workloads to Microsoft Fabric — remove HiveContext, translate WASB/ADLS paths to OneLake, replace Oozie orchestration with Data Pipelines, deploy, and validate.
prerequisites: Source HDInsight Spark/Hive scripts and Oozie workflow definitions
Target Fabric workspace with F2+ capacity

steps.description: Load the translation table (HiveContext removal, WASB/ADLS -> OneLake, Oozie -> Data Pipelines).
Create target Lakehouse. Map Hive metastore tables -> lakehouse Delta tables.
Migrate data from WASB (wasb://) / ADLS into OneLake.
Translate scripts: remove HiveContext/SQLContext (use spark.sql on a SparkSession), replace wasb:// and adl:// paths with OneLake, convert Hive DDL to Spark SQL / Delta CREATE TABLE.
Replace Oozie workflow with a Fabric Data Pipeline (or job schedules) to sequence the notebooks.

tips: Hive external tables over WASB -> lakehouse shortcuts (fabio shortcut create) if you want to keep data in place.
HDInsight cluster sizing does not migrate — Fabric manages Spark.
Route the overall effort with 'fabio context persona migration-engineer'.
